evals.prompt: Design a property-based testing strategy for a Python payment processing module
evals.expected_output: Hypothesis-based test strategies with targeted generators and invariant assertions

evals.prompt: Set up mutation testing for a JavaScript codebase using Stryker
evals.expected_output: Stryker configuration with mutation operators, thresholds, and CI integration

evals.prompt: Create a visual regression testing plan for a React component library
evals.expected_output: Playwright or Storybook visual testing setup with baseline management
